stable_commit.title: feat: add curated knowledge card dataset

project_goal: Build a multimodal emotional-support virtual digital human system with text/voice/camera input, ASR, stage-controlled LLM response, avatar output, and replay/evaluation.

dialogue.notes: Use gpt-5.2 for dialogue and summary generation.

tts.notes: Frontend playback must trust returned audio_format because wav fallback is allowed.

major_workstreams: Repository guideline and architecture document set
Detailed implementation plan and data specification
Enterprise data manifest, transcript workflow, and QC pipeline
MAGICDATA-based public Chinese ASR evaluation lane
Frontend shell, gateway, realtime session flow, export, and trace continuity
Recording controls, audio upload, preview/final ASR transcript flow
Dialogue-service schema gate, real LLM integration, stage machine, short-term memory, dialogue summary, and high-risk/fallback hardening
TTS service, frontend playback, static avatar baseline, mouth drive, dual-avatar switching, and expression presets
Offline avatar-driver validation against enterprise 3D face features
Post-review hardening for async IO, websocket delivery, MIME handling, env parsing, verifier topology, and TTS fallback stability
Curated RAG knowledge-card dataset with field, category, and high-risk handoff validation

notes: Current sampled review subset is mostly French.
Do not create Chinese gold references from the enterprise subset unless a fluent reviewer is available.
Latest stability pass fixed blocking gateway work inside async routes.
WebSocket duplicate/loss edge cases were fixed.
Parameterized MIME types like audio/webm;codecs=opus are now normalized.
Live verifier scripts now boot dialogue-service when orchestrator depends on it.
TTS now falls back to a local wav asset when edge_tts times out.
Dialogue live verifiers are confirmed with gpt-5.2 when run serially.
Offline avatar-driver validation now reads real enterprise 3D_FV_files and writes a checked report under data/derived/avatar_driver/.
RAG step 43 now keeps curated support content in data/kb/knowledge_cards.jsonl and explicitly separates it from enterprise validation media and MAGICDATA ASR references.

resume_rules: Read handoff-summary.md, then progress.md and architecture.md.
Continue from implementation plan step 44 unless redirected.
Use uv run for Python commands.
Commit and push only after passing checks.
Do not use rm for rollback; rollback through git.
